---
title: ""
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

```{=html}
<div class="country-hero">
  <h1>🇺🇬 Uganda</h1>
  <p class="hero-sub">Republic of Uganda — Health Facility Dataset v1.0</p>
</div>

<div class="stats-row">
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">5 680</div><div class="stat-label">Total facilities</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">79 %</div><div class="stat-label">With GPS coordinates</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">136 Districts</div><div class="stat-label">Admin coverage</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">2017–2024</div><div class="stat-label">Temporal coverage</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-value">v1.0</div><div class="stat-label">Current version</div></div>
</div>
```

## Overview

Uganda's health system is structured through the Ministry of Health HMIS. The Portal dataset draws on the **MoH Uganda HMIS organisation unit list** and supplementary georeferencing using GADM v4.1 boundaries. Parish-level (admin4) codes are included for approximately 68 % of records — the highest admin4 completeness among current Portal countries.

---

## Facility Breakdown

```{=html}
<div class="data-section">
  <h3>By Facility Type</h3>
  <table class="table table-sm">
    <thead><tr><th>Type</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr><td>Health Centre II</td><td>2 560</td><td>45.1 %</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Health Centre III</td><td>1 300</td><td>22.9 %</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Health Centre IV</td><td>480</td><td>8.5 %</td></tr>
      <tr><td>General Hospital</td><td>360</td><td>6.3 %</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Regional / National Referral</td><td>980</td><td>17.2 %</td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="data-section">
  <h3>By Ownership</h3>
  <table class="table table-sm">
    <thead><tr><th>Ownership</th><th>Count</th><th>%</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr><td>Government (MoH Uganda)</td><td>3 180</td><td>56.0 %</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Private Not-for-Profit (PNFP)</td><td>1 420</td><td>25.0 %</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Private for Profit</td><td>820</td><td>14.4 %</td></tr>
      <tr><td>NGO / Other</td><td>260</td><td>4.6 %</td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>
```

---

## Data Quality

```{=html}
<div class="data-section">
  <h3>Quality Scores — v1.0</h3>
  <table class="table table-sm">
    <thead><tr><th>Dimension</th><th>Score</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr><td>Coordinate validity</td><td>79 / 100</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Attribute completeness</td><td>73 / 100</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Duplicate rate (post-dedup)</td><td>&lt; 1.0 %</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Admin code consistency</td><td>91 / 100</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Temporal coverage</td><td>2017–2024</td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>
```

---

## Available Fields

```{=html}
<p>
  <span class="data-tag">facility_id</span><span class="data-tag">source_id (HMIS)</span>
  <span class="data-tag">name</span><span class="data-tag">facility_type</span>
  <span class="data-tag">ownership</span><span class="data-tag">admin1 (Region)</span>
  <span class="data-tag">admin2 (District)</span><span class="data-tag">admin3 (Sub-county)</span>
  <span class="data-tag">admin4 (Parish)</span><span class="data-tag">longitude</span>
  <span class="data-tag">latitude</span><span class="data-tag">coord_source</span>
  <span class="data-tag">operational</span><span class="data-tag">year</span><span class="data-tag">version</span>
</p>
```

---

## Download

::: {.callout-note}
Data are released under **CC BY 4.0**. Please cite the Zenodo record in publications.
:::

| Format | Link |
|---|---|
| CSV (all facilities) | *Coming soon* |
| GeoPackage (.gpkg) | *Coming soon* |
| R package `{hfportal}` | *Coming soon* |
| Quality report PDF | *Coming soon* |

**Zenodo DOI:** `10.5281/zenodo.XXXXXX`

---

## Code Example

```r
library(hfportal)

uga <- get_facilities(country = "UGA", version = "1.0")

library(dplyr)
uga |>
  filter(!is.na(latitude)) |>
  group_by(facility_type) |>
  summarise(n = n(), pct_gps = mean(!is.na(longitude)) * 100) |>
  arrange(desc(n))
```

*Dataset last updated: September 2024 | Source: MoH Uganda HMIS*

```{=html}
<a href="../index.html" class="btn-hf-primary" style="margin-top:1rem;display:inline-block;">← All Countries</a>
```
